textRuns.value: Survivorship trap: the station repelled 126 of 127 attacks (99%). The failure hides in the tail — Critical-severity attacks repel at only 96%, and the single breach (Battle of Yavin, Meridian Trench trench-run) is the one that ended the station. Never read “Attacks Repelled %” without “Critical Attacks Repelled %” beside it.
